https://www.dreambaby.com/outlet-plugs-4.title: Outlet Plugs - 48 Count
https://www.dreambaby.com/outlet-plugs-4.description:
Electrical outlets pose serious risk to curious crawlers and even older children. That’s why we’ve created an extensive range of electrical security products. These Dreambaby Outlet Plugs help prevent children from inserting their fingers or other objects into electrical outlets. They’re universal and easy to install. Covering the outlet holes, they have a transparent surface making them practically invisible to young eyes. Various pack sizes available depending on your needs, saving you money while helping your family stay safe!

Universal fit by utilizing only the prongs for installation
Outlet plugs securely cover open sockets and are difficult for children to remove
Transparent serface making them practically invisible to young eyes
Does not hinder the use of adjoining outlets
